report_metadata.title: Pune Real Estate Policy & Regulatory Intelligence

macro_summary.market_condition: Balanced-to-Seller in prime/metro zones; Buyer-favorable in peripheral areas

home_loan_rates_may_2026.note: All floating loans linked to EBLR (Repo + Spread). CIBIL 750+ required for best rates.

policy_updates.key_update: 5.25% as of Dec 2025 — 75bps cumulative cuts in 2025
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Lower EMIs, more buyers qualify for larger loan amounts
policy_updates.seller_impact: Demand stimulation supports and gently pushes prices upward
policy_updates.broker_tip: Show EMI comparison: 2023 peak (9.5%) vs today (7.25%). ₹84K/year saved on ₹60L loan

policy_updates.key_update: 7% men / 6% women in Pune. 3-year resale: duty only on price differential. Senior living ₹1,000 flat
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Women save 1%. Investors benefit from 3-year resale rule. Senior buyers get massive stamp concession
policy_updates.seller_impact: Resale rule reduces short-cycle buyer friction
policy_updates.broker_tip: Always check if wife/mother can be primary registrant — saves ₹80K+ on ₹80L property

policy_updates.key_update: 1,905+ projects suspended state-wide in a major compliance sweep (with Pune leading the breakdown), mandatory QR codes, anti-double registration, Circular 50/2025
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Scan QR for instant verification. Fraudulent projects being eliminated
policy_updates.seller_impact: Compliant developers enjoy premium trust and pricing power
policy_updates.broker_tip: Verify QR on every project ad before recommending. Visit maharera.mahaonline.gov.in

policy_updates.key_update: Active for EWS/LIG/MIG (income up to ₹9L). Subsidy up to ₹2.67L. Women-headed households preferred
policy_updates.buyer_impact: First-time buyers save ₹2–2.67L on home loan interest
policy_updates.seller_impact: PMAY-linked affordable projects see faster absorption
policy_updates.broker_tip: Ask income during first call. Under ₹9L = PMAY eligible. Apply at pmaymis.gov.in

policy_updates.key_update: Line 3 (Hinjewadi–Shivajinagar) 94%+ complete. Phase 2 (Kharadi, Wagholi) in tender. TOD zones active
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Metro proximity = 10–25% annual appreciation. Buy near Phase 2 stations early
policy_updates.seller_impact: Metro-adjacent properties sell faster and command premiums
policy_updates.broker_tip: Use Metro route maps in client meetings. Line 3 inauguration = Hinjewadi sales catalyst

policy_updates.key_update: 12–18% YoY along corridor. 25–30% cumulative gain projected on completion. Key zones: Pirangut, Wagholi, Chakan, Talegaon
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Entry under ₹70L available now. Long-term 25–30% appreciation play
policy_updates.broker_tip: Strongest 2025–2026 investment pitch. Target investor buyers for Chakan, Wagholi, Pirangut

policy_updates.key_update: 35 lakh homes by 2030, ₹70,000Cr framework. Self-Redevelopment Cell ₹2,000Cr. AI-powered SHIP portal. Faster approvals, PPP model
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Massive affordable supply pipeline. MHADA/CIDCO lotteries increasing
policy_updates.seller_impact: Developers get faster approvals, tax relaxations, development charge concessions
policy_updates.broker_tip: Track MHADA/CIDCO lottery announcements for affordable buyer pipeline

policy_updates.key_update: Cement GST 28%→18%. Buyer rates unchanged: 1% affordable, 5% non-affordable under-construction, 0% ready-to-move
policy_updates.buyer_impact: No change in buyer GST. Developer cost reductions may moderate future price hikes
policy_updates.seller_impact: Better developer margins on construction costs
policy_updates.broker_tip: 0% GST on ready-to-move saves ₹4L on ₹80L property vs under-construction. Lead with this for closures

policy_updates.key_update: 90-day TDR deadline. Documents 40→20. TOD zones: higher FSI+mixed-use within 500m of metro. UDCPR across PMRDA
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Faster approvals = fewer delays. More mixed-use options near metro stations
policy_updates.seller_impact: Faster TDR clearance helps developers launch projects quicker
policy_updates.broker_tip: TOD zones near metro = higher FSI = more inventory in 2–3 years. Near-ready is best current value

policy_updates.key_update: Cluster Scheme: 50+ acre slums, FSI above 4. Proposal window 120→60 days. Section 33-B liability for directors. Blockchain approvals
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Free-sale units better protected. Developer accountability higher
policy_updates.seller_impact: Higher FSI for large cluster projects improves developer economics
policy_updates.broker_tip: Verify free-sale freeze compliance in any SRA project. New rules make SRA free-sale flats safer than pre-2025

policy_updates.key_update: EBLR-linked rates auto-adjust with RBI cuts. CIBIL 750+ critical. SBI/HDFC most competitive. BOB at 8.10%
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Future rate cuts auto-pass through. CIBIL management = significant savings
policy_updates.seller_impact: Competitive financing keeps buyer pools large and active
policy_updates.broker_tip: Help clients get pre-approval before site visits. Filters serious buyers, accelerates closures

policy_updates.key_update: Balanced-to-seller in prime zones. 5–12% broad appreciation, up to 25% in infrastructure corridors. ₹78L avg ticket size. 19% transactions above ₹1Cr
policy_updates.buyer_impact: Buyer-favorable in periphery (negotiate). Seller market in Hinjewadi, Kharadi, KP, KN
policy_updates.seller_impact: Price correction unlikely. Quality and RERA compliance are differentiators
policy_updates.broker_tip: Match budget to micro-market precisely. Ready-to-move closes 40% faster. Emphasize developer track record
